allowed_use: Main-text novelty/gap figure showing current local category support, zero-seed gaps, and residual-pressure discipline.

forbidden_overread: Do not read seeded-category counts as empirical incidence, completeness, absence outside the current package, or proof that residual pressure has disappeared.
remaining_gate: Re-test only if a repeated pattern escapes current multi-label coverage with at least two non-capped lineages and reviewer-legible inclusion/exclusion rules.
